condition.description: Defines an IAM condition to apply, specifying attributes like expression, title, and description that must be met for the binding to be applied.

member.description: Specifies the identity to which the role will be assigned, such as a user, group, or service account; must be in the format "user:email", "group:email", or "serviceAccount:email".

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to assign to the member; must be a predefined Pub/Sub role or a custom role within the same project.

subscription.description: Specifies the Pub/Sub subscription to which the IAM member binding will be applied. Must be in the format `projects/{project}/subscriptions/{subscription}`.
